zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Jacson於大約1520年出生在英國英格蘭艾可布萊崔時，他的父親Jackson22歲，母親Jackson22歲。他於1542年4月30日與Joan Cornwell在英國艾可特林結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1574年享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可特林。

nameMeanings.name: Jacson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Jackson
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish: patronymic from Jack . In North America, this surname has absorbed other patronymics beginning with J- in various European languages, in particular those derived from equivalents or short forms and other derivatives of the personal name Jacob , e.g. Norwegian Jacobsen or Jakobsen and, in some cases, Slovenian Jakše (from a derivative of the personal name Jakob ). This surname is also very common among African Americans (see also 2 below).

African American: from the personal name Jackson (or Andrew Jackson), adopted in honor of Andrew Jackson, the 7th president of the US; or adoption of the surname in 1 above, in many cases probably for the same reason.

History: This extremely common British name was brought over by numerous different bearers in the 17th and 18th centuries. One forebear was the father and namesake of the seventh US president, Andrew Jackson, who migrated to SC from Carrickfergus in the north of Ireland in 1765. The Confederate General Thomas ‘Stonewall’ Jackson came from VA, where his great-grandfather John, likewise of Scotch–Irish stock, had settled after emigrating to America in 1748.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Jacson was born about 1520, in Braintree, Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Jackson, was 22 and his mother, Jackson, was 22. He married Joan Cornwell on 30 April 1542, in Terling, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died about 1574, at the age of 56, and was buried in Terling, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Jacsonが約1520年にイギリスイギリスエセックスブレイントレで生まれた時，父Jacksonは22歳，母Jacksonは22歳であった。1542年4月30日にイギリスエセックステルリングでJoan Cornwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は約1574年に56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックステルリングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Jacson(이)가 대략 1520년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 브레이트리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jackson(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Jackson(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1542년 4월 30일 영국 에세스 털링에서 Joan Cornwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1574년 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 털링에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Jacson родился около 1520 г. в местности бреинтри, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Jackson было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Jackson, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Cornwell 30 апреля 1542 г. в местности тирлинг, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер около 1574 г. в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности тирлинг, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
